_comment:
EDIT THIS FILE TO CHANGE ANY TEXT OR LINK ON YOUR PORTFOLIO. After editing, push to Vercel — site updates automatically. HTML uses ... for highlights,
for line breaks. **bold** in project narratives is the orange accent.

site.title: Artem Iskandirov — Product Designer
site.description: Product Designer. Uchi.ru / VK EdTech. Based in Kazan.

cat.name: Artem Iskandirov
cat.bio: Product designer working on kids edtech, retail AI, and design systems. Currently Senior at Uchi.ru / VK EdTech.
cat.gameSub: You are X · Cat is O · Cat cheats
cat.catchSub: 30 seconds — tap as many as you can

fantasy.name: Artem Iskandirov
fantasy.bio: Wandering craftsman of interfaces — forging realms of kids lore, retail divination & design sigils. Sworn Knight-Senior of the Uchi.ru hold.
meta: Open to far roads · remote keeps · relocation
fantasy.gameSub: You — Sword · Dragon — Sigil · It is no honest beast
fantasy.statusYouWin: The dragon falls. Songs shall be sung.

projects.title: Uchi.ru
projects.subtitle: Selflearning platform for kids
projects.problem: At the kids' core flow, **engagement was stagnating** because lessons felt monotonous after a few sessions.
projects.approach: I rebuilt the **learning loop with sound, gamification and a unified design system** across 1–4 grade.
projects.outcome: ARPU **+5%**, conversion rate **+7%**, won 1st AI hackathon

projects.title: Miry Avi · Speech
projects.subtitle: Speech-therapy app for preschool kids
projects.problem: Speech therapy at home felt like a chore — kids dropped off and parents lost track of progress.
projects.approach: I designed **game mechanics, characters and a parallel parent flow** to keep both sides engaged.
projects.outcome: D7 retention up, **4.7★ on the App Store** at MVP

projects.title: Ailet · JedAI
projects.subtitle: AI vision for retail & CPG
projects.problem: Field merchandisers across **P&G, Coca-Cola and Mars** struggled with dense data and slow audits in stores.
projects.approach: I led **the analytics web platform and the mobile field app** — patterns adopted across all modules.
projects.outcome: CSAT/CSI **+5pp**, support load **−8%**, task rate up

projects.title: Conditional
projects.subtitle: Visual logic builder for non-tech analysts
projects.problem: Analysts had to write **JSON formulas by hand** to ship rules — every change burned engineering time.
projects.approach: I turned the formula syntax into a **visual logic UI** non-tech users could drag together.

projects.title: Portal redesign
projects.subtitle: Detail page restructure
projects.problem: The portal detail page was a wall — users couldn't find primary actions or filter what they needed.
projects.approach: I rebuilt **information hierarchy, layout, primary CTAs and filters** from scratch.

projects.title: Adaptive tables
projects.subtitle: Dense data on small screens
projects.problem: Complex tabular data didn't fit on phones — merchandisers in the field had to zoom and pan endlessly.
projects.approach: I designed a **responsive table pattern** — adopted across every module of the product.
projects.outcome: Mobile usability up across the platform

projects.title: Realogram
projects.subtitle: Shelf recognition view
projects.problem: Auditors couldn't tell **what the AI saw** on a shelf photo — overlays were too dense and unreadable.
projects.approach: I designed **layered overlays** so anyone can read AI's recognition results on a real photo.

projects.title: Sound UX
projects.subtitle: Talk at Chulakov Design Meetup
projects.problem: Sound is **the most ignored interface layer** — designers leave it to engineers and lose product feel.
projects.approach: A 25-minute talk on **how sound shapes product feel** — lessons from Uchi.ru, kids UX, metrics.

projects.title: Custom Vibrations
projects.subtitle: iOS app for crafting haptics
projects.problem: Designing haptic patterns means **describing them in slack** — nobody can feel a Figma frame.
projects.approach: I vibe-coded an iOS app in **Cursor + SwiftUI** to test custom haptics before pitching them.
projects.outcome: Tested 30+ patterns, picks ship to production

projects.title: Telegram Digester
projects.subtitle: No-code summary bot
projects.problem: My channel feed grew faster than I could read it — important posts kept slipping through.
projects.approach: I assembled a **no-code TG bot** that ChatGPT summarises into one daily digest message.

projects.title: BI Agent
projects.subtitle: Chat-style insights over BI data
projects.problem: Retail dashboards are dense — most managers want **the answer**, not the chart.
projects.approach: I designed and built an **LLM agent** that talks to BI data and answers questions in chat.
projects.outcome: Skip the dashboard, get the answer
